name: case09_api_exchange_rate_job
description: Case 09: API exchange rate - S3 JSON source flattened to tabular format to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1": {"S3JsonSource": {"AdditionalOptions": {"EnableSamplePath": false, "SamplePath": ""}, "Exclusions": [], "JsonPath": "", "Multiline": true, "Name": "S3 JSON Source - case09_api_exchange_rate", "OptimizePerformance": false, "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "Paths": ["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case09_api_exchange_rate/"], "Recurse": true}}, "node-2": {"SparkSQL": {"Inputs": ["node-1"], "Name": "SQL Query", "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "SqlAliases": [{"Alias": "myDataSource", "From": "node-1"}], "SqlQuery": "SELECT TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF(TRIM(data_timestamp), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd\\'T\\'HH:mm:ssXXX') AS DATA_TIMESTAMP, NULLIF(TRIM(api_name), '') AS API_NAME, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(data_date), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS DATA_DATE, UPPER(NULLIF(TRIM(currency), '')) AS CURRENCY, NULLIF(TRIM(country), '') AS COUNTRY, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(buying_sight), '') AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS BUYING_SIGHT, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(buying_transfer), '') AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS BUYING_TRANSFER, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(selling), '') AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS SELLING FROM myDataSource"}}, "node-3": {"S3DirectTarget": {"AutoDataQuality": {"IsEnabled": false}, "Compression": "gzip", "Format": "csv", "Inputs": ["node-2"], "Name": "S3 Gzip CSV Target - case09_api_exchange_rate", "NumberTargetPartitions": "0", "PartitionKeys": [], "Path": "s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case09_api_exchange_rate/load/", "SchemaChangePolicy": {"EnableUpdateCatalog": false}}}}
